note: Created .github/workflows/integration.yml with two CI jobs: (1) widget-integration - runs user_journeys_test.dart with mock data, no backend needed; (2) e2e - spins up Docker Compose (Postgres, Redis, API), waits for health check, then runs api_client_test.dart and app_test.dart against the real backend. Triggers on push/PR to main when src/ or docker-compose.yml changes.
